name: Warm Artisan
description: Design language cho hand-feel craft brands với earth-tone palettes, warm serif typography, medium density. Unified archetype theo spec: hand-feel + earth tones + warm serif + medium density across 4 spec categories split into 8 buyer-persona personalities.

_meta.note: Layer 2 designer.json v3.0 - UNION-flattened from ai.json v3.0. 8 personalities aligned to spec gốc (Pottery, Coffee, Handmade × 3, Food gourmet × 3). Unified archetype: warmSerif + medium + subtle defaults across all personalities. Mixed VN/EN descriptions.

_themeContext._description: Design language cho hand-feel craft brands với earth-tone palettes, warm serif typography, medium density. Unified archetype theo spec: hand-feel + earth tones + warm serif + medium density across 4 spec categories split into 8 buyer-persona personalities.
_industries: artisan bakery / pastry / ice cream -> craftBakery
butcher / charcuterie / oil / honey / cheese -> provisionsPantry
leather / wood / brass / metal craft -> leatherWoodGoods

potteryCeramics._description: BASE personality - handmade pottery, ceramics studios, kiln-fired wares. Iconic Warm Artisan archetype: hand-feel + earth tones + warm serif + medium density. Canonical: Heath Ceramics, East Fork, Mud Australia, Notary Ceramics, Frances Palmer.

palette._axisDescription: Earth-tone palettes - tất cả unified bởi warm-earth foundation. Avoid cool grays, sage greens (Theme 04), saturated colors (Theme 03/05).

clayTerracotta._description: Warm cream background với clay terracotta accent và warm dark brown text - signature pottery studio palette. Canonical: Heath Ceramics, East Fork, Frances Palmer.
clayTerracotta.color.primaryButton.label: #0a0a0a
clayTerracotta.color.secondaryButton.label: #3D2418
clayTerracotta.color.tertiaryButton.label: #8d4d37

kilnSmoke._description: Warm cream background với kiln-smoke gray accent và warm terracotta highlight - wood-fired pottery, anagama kiln studios.
kilnSmoke.color.primaryButton.label: #ffffff
kilnSmoke.color.secondaryButton.label: #2A1F18
kilnSmoke.color.tertiaryButton.label: #6B5847

mossGlaze._description: Warm cream background với moss-green glaze accent (warm-earth, không cool-sage) - celadon studios.
mossGlaze.color.primaryButton.label: #ffffff
mossGlaze.color.secondaryButton.label: #3D2E22
mossGlaze.color.tertiaryButton.label: #5c6c4d

porcelainBone._description: Very light warm cream với soft bone tone và warm clay accent - fine porcelain studios như Mud Australia, KleinReid.
porcelainBone.color.primaryButton.label: #0a0a0a
porcelainBone.color.secondaryButton.label: #3D2418
porcelainBone.color.tertiaryButton.label: #a35840

earthenwareRust._description: Warm cream background với deep rust-terracotta accent - rustic terracotta studios, hand-built earthenware.
earthenwareRust.color.primaryButton.label: #ffffff
earthenwareRust.color.secondaryButton.label: #3D2418
earthenwareRust.color.tertiaryButton.label: #9F4E2A

typeface._axisDescription: Warm serif typography family - UNIFIED archetype default cho TẤT CẢ 8 Warm Artisan personalities theo spec gốc.

warmSerif._description: Body type warm serif (Lora, Tiempos Text) với heading display serif (Cormorant Garamond, Playfair) - UNIFIED Warm Artisan typography archetype cho TẤT CẢ 8 personalities theo spec.

displaySerif._description: Body Tiempos Text với heading display serif lớn hơn (Tiempos Headline, Bodoni, GT Sectra) - editorial-magazine brands.

handLettered._description: Warm serif body với hand-lettered/custom display heading - pottery studios, bakeries, brands với hand-drawn logotype.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Weight range light (potteryCeramics + chocolatierConfection refined) đến regular (6 personalities khác) đến medium (rustic variants).

light._description: Body 300, heading 400 - delicate refined. Default cho potteryCeramics + chocolatierConfection.

regular._description: Body 400, heading 500-600 - balanced editorial. Default cho 6 personalities khác.

medium._description: Body 500, heading 600-700 - sturdier presence cho workshop brands, country bakeries.

density._axisDescription: UNIFIED medium density default cho 6/8 personalities. chocolatierConfection + printStationer default spacious for gallery photography.

medium._description: Section padding 104px desktop, 68px mobile - UNIFIED Warm Artisan archetype default cho 6/8 personalities theo spec.

compact._description: Section padding 72px desktop - catalog/wholesale brands với dense product grid.

spacious._description: Section padding 148px desktop - editorial-gallery brands. Default cho chocolatierConfection + printStationer (gallery photography).

silhouette._axisDescription: UNIFIED subtle silhouette default cho TẤT CẢ 8 personalities theo spec gốc.

subtle._description: Border radius card 6px, button 6px, input 4px - UNIFIED Warm Artisan hand-feel archetype cho TẤT CẢ 8 personalities theo spec.

sharp._description: Border radius 0-2px - modernist editorial. Rare default trong Warm Artisan.

pillowy._description: Border radius card 12-14px - softer corners. Cho sweet shops, ice cream parlors.

specialtyCoffee._description: Third-wave specialty coffee roasters, espresso bars, pour-over shops, specialty tea houses, matcha cafes. Kế thừa potteryCeramics DNA. KEEPS unified archetype (warmSerif + medium + subtle). Pivot palette default → espressoEarth, typeWeight → regular. Canonical: Blue Bottle, Stumptown, Tim Wendelboe.

palette._axisDescription: Earth-tone palettes - tất cả unified bởi warm-earth foundation. Avoid cool grays, sage greens (Theme 04), saturated colors (Theme 03/05).

espressoEarth.color.secondaryButton.label: #2D1810
espressoEarth.color.tertiaryButton.label: #8f5c32

handLettered._description: Warm serif body với hand-lettered/custom display heading - pottery studios, bakeries, brands với hand-drawn logotype.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Weight range light (potteryCeramics + chocolatierConfection refined) đến regular (6 personalities khác) đến medium (rustic variants).

regular._description: Body 400, heading 500-600 - balanced editorial. Default cho 6 personalities khác.

medium._description: Body 500, heading 600-700 - sturdier presence cho workshop brands, country bakeries.

light._description: Body 300, heading 400 - delicate refined. Default cho potteryCeramics + chocolatierConfection.

density._axisDescription: UNIFIED medium density default cho 6/8 personalities. chocolatierConfection + printStationer default spacious for gallery photography.

medium._description: Section padding 104px desktop, 68px mobile - UNIFIED Warm Artisan archetype default cho 6/8 personalities theo spec.

spacious._description: Section padding 148px desktop - editorial-gallery brands. Default cho chocolatierConfection + printStationer (gallery photography).

compact._description: Section padding 72px desktop - catalog/wholesale brands với dense product grid.

silhouette._axisDescription: UNIFIED subtle silhouette default cho TẤT CẢ 8 personalities theo spec gốc.

subtle._description: Border radius card 6px, button 6px, input 4px - UNIFIED Warm Artisan hand-feel archetype cho TẤT CẢ 8 personalities theo spec.

sharp._description: Border radius 0-2px - modernist editorial. Rare default trong Warm Artisan.

pillowy._description: Border radius card 12-14px - softer corners. Cho sweet shops, ice cream parlors.

leatherWoodGoods._description: Hard handmade goods: leather + wood + brass + metal craft. Kế thừa potteryCeramics DNA. KEEPS unified archetype (v3.0 LOCKED serif - v1 had slabSerif which deviated). Pivot palette → tanCraft, typeWeight → regular. Canonical: Tanner Goods, Schoolhouse, Frank Clegg, Snow Peak.

palette._axisDescription: Earth-tone palettes - tất cả unified bởi warm-earth foundation. Avoid cool grays, sage greens (Theme 04), saturated colors (Theme 03/05).

tanCraft._description: Warm cream background với warm tan/saddle accent và brass highlight - signature workshop palette cho leather, brass, modern hardware.
tanCraft.color.primaryButton.label: #ffffff
tanCraft.color.secondaryButton.label: #3A2418
tanCraft.color.tertiaryButton.label: #8a5c36

walnutEarth._description: Warm cream với deep walnut brown text và warm copper accent - walnut woodworking studios, dark wood furniture.
walnutEarth.color.primaryButton.label: #0a0a0a
walnutEarth.color.secondaryButton.label: #3F2818

saddleBrown._description: Deep saddle brown background với warm cream text và copper accent - saddle-leather workshops, dark leather brands.
saddleBrown.color.primaryButton.label: #0a0a0a
saddleBrown.color.secondaryButton.label: #EFDDB5
saddleBrown.color.tertiaryButton.label: #ddaf87
